独家披露：ChatGPT 广告内幕——提示词驱动的精准投放

EXCLUSIVE: Leaked Deck Reveals StackAdapt's Playbook for ChatGPT Ads

2026-04-21

据 Adweek 独家报道，程序化广告平台 StackAdapt 的内部资料泄露，揭示了 ChatGPT 广告试点项目的详细运作方式。

核心要点：

  • 投放机制：基于用户输入提示词的语义相关性匹配广告，而非传统的人口统计学定向
  • 定价模式：CPM（千次展示成本）$15-$60，远高于传统展示广告
  • 准入门槛：试点项目最低预算 $50,000，筛选大型广告主优先测试
  • 独家合作：StackAdapt 作为首批接入 ChatGPT 广告生态的 DSP 之一

这一模式标志着广告行业从"搜索意图"向"对话意图"的范式转移。当用户在 ChatGPT 中提问时，AI 分析其需求意图并实时匹配相关广告——这比关键词搜索更能捕捉用户的真实需求场景。

对于广告主而言，这意味着可以介入用户决策的更早期阶段；对于 OpenAI，这是将海量对话流量商业化的关键一步；而对于整个 AI 行业，这可能是"Agent 经济"中广告模式的原型。

阅读原文

Adweek's exclusive report reveals leaked internal documents from programmatic advertising platform StackAdapt, detailing how ChatGPT's ad pilot program operates.

Key highlights:

  • Targeting mechanism: Ads matched based on semantic relevance to user prompts, not traditional demographic targeting
  • Pricing model: CPM (cost per thousand impressions) ranges from $15-$60, significantly higher than traditional display ads
  • Entry barrier: $50,000 minimum spend for the pilot program, prioritizing large advertisers for initial testing
  • Exclusive partnership: StackAdapt as one of the first DSPs integrated into ChatGPT's advertising ecosystem

This model marks a paradigm shift in advertising from "search intent" to "conversation intent." When users ask questions in ChatGPT, the AI analyzes their needs and matches relevant ads in real-time—capturing user intent more precisely than keyword searches.

For advertisers, this means engaging at earlier stages of user decision-making; for OpenAI, it's a crucial step toward monetizing massive conversational traffic; and for the AI industry, this could be the prototype for advertising models in the "Agent Economy."
